name: Skin Cancer Screening
description: Full-body skin examination by dermatologist to detect signs of skin cancer and precancerous lesions.

name: Mole Removal (Non-Surgical)
description: Professional removal of benign moles through laser or radiofrequency techniques.

name: Skin Biopsy
description: Tissue sample extraction for laboratory analysis to diagnose skin conditions and cancer.

name: Patch Testing
description: Allergy testing to identify contact dermatitis triggers and allergens affecting skin.

name: Acne Treatment (Chemical Peel)
description: Chemical solution application to treat acne, reduce scars, and improve skin texture.

name: Wart Removal
description: Removal of common, plantar, or genital warts using laser, cryotherapy, or topical treatments.

name: Cyst Removal
description: Surgical excision of epidermal, sebaceous, or other benign skin cysts.

name: Mohs Micrographic Surgery
description: Precision surgical technique for removing skin cancer with minimal damage to healthy tissue. High cure rates.

name: Skin Excision
description: Surgical removal of suspicious or unwanted skin lesions with closure and possible reconstruction.

name: Scar Revision Surgery
description: Surgical techniques to minimize appearance of scars through excision, grafting, or tissue rearrangement.

name: Botox Treatment
description: Botulinum toxin injections to reduce dynamic wrinkles and fine lines on forehead, eyes, and between brows.

name: Dermal Fillers
description: Injectable gels (hyaluronic acid, calcium hydroxylapatite) to add volume, fill wrinkles, and enhance facial contours.

name: Laser Resurfacing
description: Fractional or ablative laser treatment to improve skin texture, reduce wrinkles, scars, and sun damage.

name: Chemical Peel (Cosmetic)
description: Application of chemical solution to exfoliate and rejuvenate skin, reducing hyperpigmentation and fine lines.

name: Microneedling
description: Collagen-induction therapy using fine needles to reduce scars, wrinkles, and improve skin texture.

name: Microdermabrasion
description: Mechanical exfoliation using abrasive crystals to polish skin and reduce fine lines, acne scars, and sun damage.

name: Laser Hair Removal
description: Laser treatment to permanently reduce unwanted hair growth on face and body through multiple sessions.

name: IPL Photofacial
description: Intense pulsed light treatment to reduce age spots, redness, broken capillaries, and improve overall skin tone.

name: CoolSculpting
description: Non-invasive cryolipolysis treatment to eliminate stubborn fat deposits under the skin on face and body.

name: Hydrafacial
description: Vortex-fusion technology combining cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, and hydration in one treatment.

name: Vampire Facial (PRP)
description: Platelet-rich plasma combined with microneedling to stimulate collagen and improve skin texture naturally.

name: Lip Filler
description: Dermal filler injection to enhance lip volume, definition, and shape for fuller appearance.

name: Under-Eye Treatment
description: Targeted treatment for dark circles, puffiness, and fine lines under the eyes using fillers or lasers.

name: Skin Tightening (Radiofrequency)
description: Non-invasive radiofrequency energy to tighten loose skin and stimulate collagen production on face and body.

name: Tattoo Removal
description: Laser removal of unwanted tattoos through multiple sessions to break down ink particles for fading.

name: Acne Scar Treatment (Subcision)
description: Subcutaneous incision technique to release fibrotic tethered scars and stimulate collagen remodeling.

name: Stretch Mark Removal
description: Laser or radiofrequency treatment to reduce visibility of stretch marks and improve skin appearance.

name: Cellulite Treatment
description: Non-invasive treatment using acoustic wave therapy or radiofrequency to reduce cellulite appearance.

name: Age Spot Removal
description: Laser or intense pulsed light treatment to remove brown spots and sun-induced pigmentation.

name: Rosacea Treatment
description: Laser or IPL treatment to reduce facial redness, flushing, and visible blood vessels associated with rosacea.
